title: mimulus langsdorffii var. nasutus
intro: Mimulus langsdorffii var. nasutus, also known as Western Monkey Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mimulus langsdorffii var. nasutus include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations.
